uk-legal.title: UK Legal
uk-legal.description: UK case law (TNA Find Case Law), legislation (legislation.gov.uk), Hansard, Bills, Parliamentary Votes, Committees, HMRC guidance, and OSCOLA citation parsing.

govuk.title: GOV.UK
govuk.description: GOV.UK content, guidance, organisations, and postcode-to-local-authority lookup. Use for IPO guidance, government IP policy, and official UK IP office publications.

uk-due-diligence.title: UK Due Diligence
uk-due-diligence.description: Companies House, Charity Commission, HMLR Land Registry, The Gazette (insolvency notices), and HMRC VAT register. Use for counterparty diligence in IP enforcement matters.

Solve Intelligence.title: Solve Intelligence
Solve Intelligence.description: Patent workflows — search patent and non-patent literature, legal texts, SEP technical standards, prior art, claim analysis. Covers UK, EP, and PCT patents.

Slack.title: Slack
Slack.description: Search messages, read channels, find discussions across your workspace.

Google Drive.title: Google Drive
Google Drive.description: Search, read, and fetch documents from Google Drive.
